narrative:
Franklin Township (precinct in Licking County) has 1,614 registered voters, with 49.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.4 percentage points.
